title: schoenus crassiculmis
intro: Schoenus crassiculmis, also known as the 'tall club-rush' or 'woolly club-rush', is a perennial plant species belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Schoenus crassiculmis include the potential treatment of digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Schoenus crassiculmis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
